11001.Name: Slumberdream Mask - Raving
11001.Description:
Boss ATK +30%, HP +20%;
[Slumberdream Sigils] dropped by Bosses are guaranteed to be Epic quality.
11001.Content: Complete Slumberdream weekly quests to unlock

11002.Name: Slumberdream Mask - Somniloquy
11002.Description:
When a player's HP is not full, damage they take+30%;
When a player's HP is full, damage they take-30%
11002.Content: Complete Slumberdream weekly quests to unlock

11003.Name: Slumberdream Mask - Bewilderment
11003.Content: Complete Slumberdream weekly quests to unlock

11004.Name: Slumberdream Mask - Betrayal
11004.Description:
Elite HP and Boss HP +100%, ATK +50%;
Drop rate of [Slumberdream Remnants] from Elites and Bosses +60%.
11004.Content: Complete Slumberdream weekly quests to unlock

11005.Name: Slumberdream Mask - Nightmare
11005.Description:
Monsters are affected by Void Corruption (HP +20%, ATK +20%;
Drop rate of [Slumberdream Sigils] from monsters is doubled.
11005.Content: Complete Slumberdream weekly quests to unlock

11006.Name: Slumberdream Mask - Snicker
11006.Description:
Player HP cannot exceed 50% of Max HP;
Monster Max HP -30%
11006.Content: Complete Slumberdream weekly quests to unlock

11007.Name: Slumberdream Mask - Veiled Moon
11007.Description:
While out of combat, [Slumberdream Value] gain rate +100%;
While in combat, [Slumberdream Value] gain rate −20%
11007.Content: Complete Slumberdream weekly quests to unlock

11008.Name: Slumberdream Mask - Echo
11008.Description:
For each unit, damage taken is stored and then settled every 5 seconds;
Damage taken by monsters +15%
11008.Content: Complete Slumberdream weekly quests to unlock

11009.Name: Slumberdream Mask - Finale
11009.Description:
Monster ATK and HP +10%; Elites and stronger monsters gain an additional 10%;
[Slumberdream Remnants] gained from combat +40%
11009.Content: Complete Slumberdream weekly quests to unlock

11010.Name: Slumberdream Mask - Symmetry
11010.Description:
Monsters gain [Protection]: DMG Reduction +50%. Each time damage is taken, this effect -0.5%;
Damage taken by players −30%
11010.Content: Complete Slumberdream weekly quests to unlock

12001.Name: Twilight Seed
12001.Description:
Stat Boost: Increases ATK, DEF, and HP after being used in the Slumberdream Valley.
Mental Resistance: Significantly slows Slumberdream Value accumulation in the Slumberdream Valley.
12001.Content: Complete Slumberdream weekly quests to unlock
